mapper.select: SELECT student_id, COUNT(CASE WHEN status='PRESENT' THEN 1 END) AS present_count, COUNT(*) AS total_count, ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN status='PRESENT' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2) AS attendance_rate FROM attendance_record GROUP BY student_id

SELECT student_id, COUNT(CASE WHEN status='PRESENT' THEN 1 END) AS present_count, COUNT(*) AS total_count, ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN status='PRESENT' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2) AS attendance_rate FROM attendance_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId} GROUP BY student_id
SELECT * FROM attendance_record WHERE attendance_date = #{attendanceDate} ORDER BY period
SELECT * FROM attendance_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY attendance_date DESC, period DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance_record (student_id, attendance_date, period, status, create_time, course_id, course_name) SELECT #{studentId}, #{attendanceDate}, #{period}, #{status, javaType=Util.AttendanceStatus, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, NOW(), c.id, c.course_name FROM course_schedule c WHERE c.order_num = #{period} LIMIT 1 ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = VALUES(status), create_time = NOW(), course_id = VALUES(course_id), course_name = VALUES(course_name)

INSERT INTO attendance_record ( student_id, attendance_date, period, course_id, course_name, status, create_time ) VALUES ( #{studentId}, #{attendanceDate}, #{period}, #{courseId}, #{courseName}, #{status, javaType=Util.AttendanceStatus, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, NOW() )
INSERT INTO attendance (student_id, date, period, status, update_time) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{date}, #{period}, #{status}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = VALUES(status), update_time = NOW()
